_comment: Copy this to .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored), fill in your Hyperspell credentials, restart Claude Code. Version is pinned; bump deliberately. NOTE: the official MCP server's --tools arg only accepts 'code' or 'docs' (server-side categories), NOT specific method names — to restrict per-method writes for Invariant 2, use --code-blocked-methods with regex patterns. For now this config exposes the default tool set; Invariant 2 (only convex/reinforceNode.ts writes triage_history) is enforced at the application layer, not the MCP layer. The bin name is mcp-server inside the scoped package — invoke via -p so npx finds it.
